From medical.txt:
Treatment Protocol: Type 2 Diabetes. First-line: Metformin 500mg twice daily. If HbA1c above 7.5% after 3 months, add Empagliflozin 10mg. Monitor eGFR every 6 months. Contraindicated if eGFR below 30. Drug interaction: Metformin + contrast dye = lactic acidosis risk, hold 48h.
